creator: jkim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Frank Way from comment #1)
It seems NetBSD driver is based on FreeBSD driver:

https://github.com/Aquantia/aqtion-freebsd

It is actually available from the FreeBSD ports tree.

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/net/aquantia-atlantic-kmod
https://www.freshports.org/net/aquantia-atlantic-kmod

Have you tried it?
